weather: Rainy and cold in Longmeadow today — high of 42°F with NE winds 10–15 mph and a 90% chance of rain. Rain clears early, but it’s a stay-inside-and-execute kind of morning.
focus: Run a subject line A/B test. Write two challengers to your current best-performer. Angle A: pain-focused — “Your competitors are booking jobs you’re missing.” Angle B: results-first — “How an MA home service company turned $4k into $86k in LSA spend.” Queue both in Instantly for tomorrow’s batch and pick a winner in 48 hours.

Build your 3-step non-reply follow-up sequence. For anyone who opened but hasn’t replied in 72+ hours — Email 1 (day 4): one-liner, “Did this hit at a bad time?” Email 2 (day 7): 2-sentence case study drop, no pitch. Email 3 (day 12): soft close, “Happy to do a free LSA audit, no strings.” Load it into Instantly today so it runs automatically.

Pull your Instantly pipeline right now. How many contacts opened in the last 7 days? Any replies sitting unread? Sort by “last opened,” flag your top 10 hottest contacts, and send each one a manual one-liner today. Don’t let warm leads go cold while you’re focused on new outreach.

Lock in your case study one-liner. “$86k booked from $4k in LSA spend — 21x return in 90 days for a home service client in MA.” Finalize the exact wording, then put it in three places: top of your cold email template, your LinkedIn headline, and the opening line of your sales call.

Map your AI receptionist upsell trigger. You’ll close your first LSA client soon — know in advance when and how you introduce the $500/mo add-on. Define the trigger now: Is it 30 days in? First time they mention a missed call? Write the two-sentence transition script so it’s ready when the moment comes.
reminders: Close your first LSA client. Every day without one is revenue left on the table.
Follow up beats outreach. If someone opened your email, they’re thinking about it.
You’re not in the AI business — you’re in the results business. Lead with numbers.
